revision.comment: chang TOC to one that doesn't scroll sideways
I found four articles, added information to all four.
revision.text:
methylmalate dehydatase in enzymology it is an enzyme that catalyzes chemical reactions. Also belongs to the family of lyases, it has two products with water ((S)-2-methylmalate 2-methylfumarate + H2O). In addition, “ lyases which is also a enzyme catalyzes the breaking the elimination reaction of the variety of amounts of chemical bonds from hydrolysis (a substitution reaction ) and oxidation, which forms a new double bond or a new ring structure”. . PMID 5903732. <ref></ref>https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/(S)-2-methylmalate_dehydratase
3 amino 2 methylpropionate transminase. One thing about this in particular article is that is also another enzyme that catalyzes chemical reactions. This specific enzyme is originated from the family of transferases, specifically (transaminases) that transfers nitrogenous groups. The systematic name of this particular enzyme is ((S)-3-amino-2-methylpropanoate:2-oxoglutarate aminotransferase). In this enzyme there are two substrates with two different products ((S)-3-amino-2-methylpropanoate + 2-oxoglutarate 2-methyl-3-oxopropanoate + L-glutamate). But some additional information is that this enzyme catalyzed it transamination with L isomer, but D isomer in natural form, inactive as substrate. In addition,” a transferase is one of the classes of enzymes that enact transfer of specific functional groups”. .doi:10.1016/0304-4165(68)90267-5. PMID 5641913. </ref></ref>https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/(S)-3-amino-2-methylpropionate_transaminase
(S)-2-hydroxy-acid oxidase is an enzyme, catalyzes the chemical reaction (S)-2-hydroxy acid + O2 2-oxo acid + H2O2 Thus, the two substrates of this enzyme are (S)-2-hydroxy acid and O2, whereas its two products are 2-oxo acid and H2O2.This enzyme belongs to the family of oxidoreductases, specifically those acting on the CH-OH group of donor with oxygen as acceptor. The systematic name of this enzyme class is (S)-2-hydroxy-acid:oxygen 2-oxidoreductase. In addition, “an oxidoreductase is a enzyme, catalyzes the transfer of electrons from one molecule”. doi:10.1016/0005-2744(68)90273-8. PMID 5686300<ref></ref>https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/(S)-2-hydroxy-acid_oxidase
a (S)-2-hydroxy-fatty-acid dehydrogenase is an enzyme, catalyzes the chemical reaction(S)-2 hydroxystearate + NAD 2-oxostearate + NADH + H thus, the two substrates of this enzyme are (S)-2-hydroxystearate and NAD, whereas its 3 products are 2-oxostearate, NADH, and H. This enzyme belongs to the family of oxidoreductases, specifically those acting on the CH-OH group of donor with NAD or NADP as acceptor. The systematic name of this enzyme class is (S)-2-hydroxystearate:NAD oxidoreductase. In addition, “Glyceraldehyde 3-phosphate is not only a reaction of this but a chemical compound that occurs as an intermediate in several central metabolic pathways”. PMID 4909888<ref></ref>https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/(S)-2-hydroxy-fatty-acid_dehydrogenase

revision.text:
Luqmaan Phiri, he is King supreme.
He cannot be explained in words, how work is extraordinary.
I've never seen such a person like him, once you meet him you'll never notice, he is a great'actor'in such a way that you will never believe his Legendary work.
I salute him and ask him to keep up the good work.
